$comment: Phase 7 sprint 1 #4 harness skeleton (Day 212). Sprint 2 で Phase 6 spec gen output から拡張、本 file は scaffolding 確認用 minimal set.

schema.shape: trivial / rewriting / constructor / arithmetic / quantified / higher-order
schema.expected_solvers: list of solvers expected to succeed (baseline = sorry は常に compile、proof rate measurement の reference として 0 score 扱い)
schema.premises_form: for duper: how to pass premises ([], [*], [h1, h2], etc.)

benchmarks.statement: (p q : Prop) (h : p ∧ q) : q ∧ p
(p q r : Prop) (hpq : p → q) (hqr : q → r) (hp : p) : r
(α β γ : Type) (f : α → β) (g : β → γ) (x : α) (y : β) (z : γ) (h1 : f x = y) (h2 : g y = z) : g (f x) = z
